description: A deterministic consensus mechanism for autonomous agents to agree on shared decisions or outputs.

proposal_set.description: List of proposals submitted by agents.

voting_rules.description: Rules defining how votes are counted and consensus is reached.

agent_registry.description: List of participating agents with identifiers.

workflow.action: Agents submit proposals to the consensus pool.
Each agent votes according to deterministic rules.
Votes are tallied using the defined voting rules.
Consensus result is produced in machine-readable form.
